location: Not a fixed pickup — random drop from Foot Soldiers and Exile Soldiers who wield it; best farmed from Godrick Foot Soldiers east of the Deathtouched Catacombs in Limgrave, or from Exile Soldiers inside Stormveil Castle
tactics: East of the Deathtouched Catacombs grace, toward the crucible/knight area, a small group of Godrick Soldiers includes a couple of crossbow-wielders
Inside Stormveil, resting at Limgrave Tower Bridge grace then heading back into the castle aggroes a group of Exile Soldiers, several of whom carry this crossbow
Drop rate is low (roughly 4% at base Discovery); expect repeated kills, and a Discovery-boosting talisman/item helps
lore: A crudely made crossbow that anyone can pick up and fire, but one that lacks both stopping power and accuracy.

builds.name: Throwaway early ranged tool
builds.why: Lightest and weakest crossbow but free from farming and needs minimal stats, useful purely as an early pulling/aggro tool
